# Upstash

> Serverless data platform — Redis, Vector Search, QStash (message queues), Workflow, Search, and Box (compute). Fully managed, pay-per-use, no idle costs.
> Website: https://upstash.com
> Console: https://console.upstash.com

---

## Pricing Pages

### Redis
- [Pricing (UI)](https://upstash.com/pricing/redis): Interactive pricing page with plan cards and comparison table
- [Pricing (Markdown)](https://upstash.com/pricing/redis.md): Machine-readable full pricing — plans, limits, feature matrix, and FAQ

**Quick reference:**
- Free: $0, 256 MB data, 500K commands/month
- Pay as You Go: $0.20 per 100K commands, 100 GB data, unlimited bandwidth
- Fixed 250MB: $10/month (+$5/read region), 250 MB data, 50 GB bandwidth
- Fixed 1GB: $20/month (+$10/read region), 1 GB data, 100 GB bandwidth
- Fixed 5GB: $100/month (+$50/read region), 5 GB data, 500 GB bandwidth
- Fixed 10GB: $200/month (+$100/read region), 10 GB data, 1 TB bandwidth
- Fixed 50GB: $400/month (+$200/read region), 50 GB data, 5 TB bandwidth
- Fixed 100GB: $800/month (+$400/read region), 100 GB data, 10 TB bandwidth
- Fixed 500GB: $1500/month (+$750/read region), 500 GB data, 20 TB bandwidth
- Enterprise: Custom pricing — contact sales@upstash.com

### QStash
- [Pricing (UI)](https://upstash.com/pricing/qstash): Interactive pricing page
- [Pricing (Markdown)](https://upstash.com/pricing/qstash.md): Machine-readable full pricing

**Quick reference:**
- Free: $0, 1,000 messages/day
- Pay as You Go: $1 per 100K messages, unlimited messages/day (retries are free)
- Fixed 1M: $180/month, 1M messages/day, 1 TB bandwidth
- Fixed 10M: $420/month, 10M messages/day, 5 TB bandwidth
- Enterprise: Custom — contact sales@upstash.com

### Vector
- [Pricing (UI)](https://upstash.com/pricing/vector): Interactive pricing page
- [Pricing (Markdown)](https://upstash.com/pricing/vector.md): Machine-readable full pricing

**Quick reference:**
- Free: $0, 200M vectors×dimensions, 10K daily queries, 1 GB total data
- Pay as You Go: $0.40 per 100K requests + $0.25/GB storage, 2B vectors×dims, unlimited queries, 50 GB data
- Fixed: $60/month, 2B vectors×dims, 1M daily queries, 50 GB data
- Pro: Contact us, 100B vectors×dims, unlimited queries, 1 TB data, 99.99% SLA

### Workflow
- [Pricing (UI)](https://upstash.com/pricing/workflow): Interactive pricing page
- [Pricing (Markdown)](https://upstash.com/pricing/workflow.md): Machine-readable full pricing

**Quick reference (built on QStash, billed by steps):**
- Free: $0, 1,000 steps/day
- Pay as You Go: $1 per 100K steps
- Fixed 1M: $180/month, 1M steps/day
- Fixed 10M: $420/month, 10M steps/day
- Enterprise: Custom — contact sales@upstash.com

### Search
- [Pricing (UI)](https://upstash.com/pricing/search): Interactive pricing page
- [Pricing (Markdown)](https://upstash.com/pricing/search.md): Machine-readable full pricing

**Quick reference:**
- Free: $0, 20K queries/month, 200K records
- Pay as You Go: $0.05 per 1K requests, unlimited queries, 2M records
- Pro: Coming Soon

### Box
- [Pricing (UI)](https://upstash.com/pricing/box): Interactive pricing page
- [Pricing (Markdown)](https://upstash.com/pricing/box.md): Machine-readable full pricing

**Quick reference (serverless compute, AWS us-east-1):**
- Free: $0, 10 concurrent boxes, 5 CPU hours/month, $1 LLM budget
- Pay as You Go (usage): Small $0.10, Medium $0.20, Large $0.40 per active CPU hour + $0.10/GB/month storage
- Pay as You Go (keep-alive): Small $8, Medium $16, Large $32/month
- Enterprise: Custom — contact sales@upstash.com

---

## Prod Pack Add-on (Redis, QStash, Workflow)

Available on all paid plans. Includes:
- Uptime SLA
- SOC 2 Type 2 compliance report
- Advanced monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, New Relic
- Multi-Zone high availability (Redis)
- Role-based access control (ACL)
- Encryption at rest

Enable from the database/resource details page in the Upstash console.

---

## Enterprise

For high-volume, compliance-sensitive, or custom-contract workloads across all products:
- All Prod Pack features for all resources
- Dedicated professional support + technical account manager
- Unlimited databases/resources
- HIPAA compliance
- VPC peering / AWS PrivateLink
- SAML SSO
- Custom monthly or annual contracts
- Access logging (Redis)

Contact: support@upstash.com
More info: https://upstash.com/enterprise

---

## Support

- Community: Discord and GitHub discussions
- Email support: Available on all paid plans — support@upstash.com
- Professional Support (SLA): https://upstash.com/docs/common/help/prosupport
- Dedicated Slack channel: Enterprise only
